software_record.task_intent: MZmine bounded availability probe or launcher/source-packet plan
software_record.reference_or_index: not applicable for availability probe or launcher plan
software_record.environment: current local PATH/Python/R environment unless a verified container or workflow runtime is supplied
supports_claims: local availability or launcher-plan provenance only

candidate_install_routes: Candidate official installation route for MZmine; verify current documentation, version, license, and platform requirements before use.
Candidate conda/bioconda/container route for MZmine; verify package/channel/image source, tag, and license before use.
minimal_fixture: Small public/test mzML/feature table/protein table fixture plus database/search-parameter provenance.
required_run_evidence: exact command line or workflow step
reference/index/database name and version when applicable
input file manifest and sample metadata boundary
logs, warnings, QC metrics, and failure messages
stop_conditions: tool is unavailable in the current environment and no container/install plan is provided
version, command, reference/index, inputs, outputs, or logs are missing
private clinical data or unpublished data lack explicit local handling boundaries
the result is being used to claim mechanism, causality, clinical utility, or publication readiness without independent validation
evidence_boundary: Launcher/source-packet plan only; not an executed software run or scientific result.
